publish.note: The post will be published immediately on Instagram
publish.confirmDescription: The post will be published immediately on Instagram. This action cannot be undone.
publish.publishingDescription: Please wait while the post is published on Instagram.

toast.processing: Post being processed by Instagram. Track on the deliveries page.

warnings.revoked: Instagram token has been revoked. Reconnect the account in the client settings.
warnings.expired: Instagram token has expired. Reconnect the account in the client settings.
warnings.missingPermission: Publish permission not granted. Reconnect the account with the required permissions.
